---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case

What problem are you trying to solve? What workflow would this improve?

## Proposed Solution

How would you expect this to work? Include CLI examples if applicable.

```bash
ruah <proposed-command> [options]
```

## Alternatives Considered

Are there existing features or workarounds that partially address this?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
